data/maps/EverGrandeCity_SidneysRoom/tex.EverGrandeCity_SidneysRoom_Text_190728:
Welcome, challenger!
I'm SIDNEY of the ELITE FOUR.\pI like that look you're giving me.
I guess you'll give me a good match.\lThat's good! Looking real good!\pAll right! You and me, let's enjoy a
battle that can only be staged here\lin the POKéMON LEAGUE!
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_SidneysRoom/tex.EverGrandeCity_SidneysRoom_Text_Defeat: Well, how do you like that? I lost!\nEh, it was fun, so it doesn't matter.
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_SidneysRoom/tex.EverGrandeCity_SidneysRoom_Text_PostBatt: Well, listen to what this loser has\nto say.\pYou've got what it takes to go far.\nNow, go on to the next room and enjoy\lyour next battle!
